title: Create core/session.py - Session management module
description: Create src/tflow/core/session.py implementing workflow-level Session management. This module should coordinate workflow context, task tracking, and state management across WorkflowEngine, JobManager, and ExecutionStore. The Session class should manage workflow execution context including goal, scope, plan, tasks, and execution state.

criteria: Session class has workflow_id, session_id, status, context attributes
Session coordinates with WorkflowEngine, JobManager, ExecutionStore
Session provides task tracking via task_ids list
Session has to_dict() and from_dict() methods for persistence

implementation: Create Session class with workflow_id, session_id, status, context attributes
Add task_ids list for tracking associated tasks
Add context dict for workflow execution context (goal, scope, plan, tasks)
Add methods: add_task(), remove_task(), set_context(), get_context()
Add to_dict() and from_dict() for persistence
Add SessionManager class for creating and tracking sessions

commands: python -c 'from tflow.core.session import Session, SessionManager; print("Import OK")'

reference.pattern: Follow delegate/session.py pattern but with workflow-level scope
